title: get_list_converter strips surrounding quotes from individual items
body:
get_list_converter() in radicli/util.py strips leading/trailing single and double quotes from each item, but only handles the case where both quotes match. A value like "'hello" (only leading quote) strips the leading quote incorrectly.



Fix: only strip quotes when both the leading and trailing quote characters match (i.e. value[0] == value[-1]).
Add a test in radicli/tests/test_util.py.
